isi.lyrics:
Lyric 12BH - 너와 난 영원한 꿈 (Love Is Ever)

Romanization

nareunhan i bange nuwo
giureojin uriui sigan
jageuman sarange gidae

tto ireoge muldeuneun neowa na
mulgeun neon soksagyeo
geujeo nal orae bwajwo

neowa nan yeongwonhan kkum
geu sarangeun kkok
neukji anko

yeorin nun neoreul damgo
soranhan i bam
ana juja

jamdeun neoui eolgureul geuryeo
uri orae gateun kkumeul kkuja

neowa nan yeongwonhan kkum
geu sarangeun kkok
neukji anko

yeorin nun neoreul damgo
soranhan i bam
ana juja

neowa nan yeongwonhan kkum
geu sarangeun kkok
neukji anko

yeorin nun neoreul damgo
soranhan i bam
ana juja

Hangeul

나른한 이 방에 누워
기울어진 우리의 시간
자그만 사랑에 기대

또 이렇게 물드는 너와 나
묽은 넌 속삭여
그저 날 오래 봐줘

너와 난 영원한 꿈
그 사랑은 꼭
늙지 않고

여린 눈 너를 담고
소란한 이 밤
안아 주자

잠든 너의 얼굴을 그려
우리 오래 같은 꿈을 꾸자

너와 난 영원한 꿈
그 사랑은 꼭
늙지 않고

여린 눈 너를 담고
소란한 이 밤
안아 주자

그 사랑은 꼭
늙지 않고

소란한 이 밤
안아 주자

isi.lyrics:
Lyric 12BH - Elak

Romanization

I don’t understand
My life is always a mess
What am I missing?
I wish I had gotten my time back

But I will never reach
'Cause she’s so complicated
You said that I lack love
But that’s not everything

I’m just like
I'm just like a little boy, I need a rest
This city’s so harsh, I’m losing my breath
Lost in the night, still all alone
Is there anyone on my side?

For you, I don’t care if you drink 10 cups of coffee
Stay for a while, then fade when the light’s low
And I'm learning to breathe again
Out of reach, out of sight I’ll never be the same

bulgeojin eolgul
eorinaicheoreom
saramdeuri moyeo
seulpeum malgo sarang

For you, I don’t care if you drink 10 cups of coffee
Stay for a while, then fade when the light’s low
And I'm learning to breathe again
Out of reach, out of sight I’ll never be

Stay for a while, then fade when the light’s low
For you
Out of reach, out of sight I’ll never be the same

I’m just like

For you, I don’t care if you drink 10 cups of coffee

isi.lyrics:
Lyric 12BH - Laura

Romanization

Laura
Do you remember the day we met?
You greeted me at the door
And I knew, I'd always be by your side

I feel you Laura
From the morning light to the end of my boring day
When I see you waving at me
Then I run to you again
I’m lost in your love

Chasing the sunshine
We’ll dance in the park, where we belong
With every step we’ll feel so free
Ride the breeze
Across the golden skies

Laura
whoo whoo whoo whoo whoo whoo whoo
Laura
whoo whoo whoo whoo whoo whoo whoo

Laura
I don’t wanna grow old
'Cause you will see my wrinkles
Savor these days
No matter, what ever you go
I just need your smile
I’m lost in your love

I’m lost in your love

Chasing the sunshine
We’ll dance in the park, where we belong
With every step we’ll feel so free
Ride the breeze
Across the golden skies
